programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: (PG) Philip Chan investigates the mystery surrounding Bruce Lee’s death. By combing through documents and interviewing experts, he explores if feuds or foul play killed the legend.

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: (PG) Bill Kalush gains access to Harry Houdini's secret diary. Experts use these personal accounts to explore the magician’s rise and investigate the dark mysteries behind his death.

programme.title: Paranormal State
programme.desc: (M) PRS heads to CA to help a family flee their home. Ryan suspects Native American land holds the key. They fight to reclaim the house but find the family may have invited the guest.

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.
